description: StreamData model. Defines the abstract Archive base, RawArchive (instant measurements), RollupArchive (derived bucketed-aggregation archives), TimeRangeArchive (externally pre-aggregated [from, to) windowed data), and supporting enum/record types. 1.1.0 → 1.2.0 renamed CkArchive → Archive (abstract) + introduced RawArchive; 1.2.0 → 1.3.0 adds TimeRangeArchive (additive, no entity migration needed); 1.3.0 → 1.4.0 adds RollupArchive.BucketAlignment + the BucketAlignment enum so monthly / weekly / yearly rollups are expressible (additive, pre-1.4.0 entities resolve to FixedSize); 1.4.0 → 1.5.0 adds computed columns on CkArchiveColumn (Name + Formula + ResultType + ComputedState) and the CkComputedColumnResultType / CkComputedColumnState enums (additive, pre-1.5.0 columns have null computed fields); 1.5.0 → 1.6.0 adds the optimistic recompute model (AB#4184): Archive dirty-tracking + observability attributes (DirtyWindows, PendingRecomputeRanges, RecomputeInProgress, Last* fields, all runtime-state), the CkArchiveDirtyWindow / CkArchiveRecomputeRange records, the RecomputeJob history entity, and the CkRecomputeChangeKind / CkRecomputeChangeSource / CkRecomputeJobState / CkRecomputeTrigger enums (additive, pre-1.6.0 entities have null/empty recompute state); 1.6.0 → 1.6.1 adds CkArchiveColumn.ComputedVersion (AB#4189 Phase 7) — the engine-managed physical-column version pointer that lets a computed column's formula change on an active archive via a versioned physical column ({base}__v{N}) + atomic pointer flip, and marks CkArchiveColumn.ComputedState runtime-state too (additive, pre-1.6.1 computed columns are version 0); 1.6.1 → 1.6.2 adds CkArchiveColumn.PendingFormula (AB#4189 Phase 7) — the transient in-progress marker for a formula change that drives the ingest dual-write and is cleared on the atomic swap (additive, null in steady state). Loaded only when StreamData is enabled at the instance level.
